ogTitle: Susan River vs Suttor: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Susan River and Suttor.
heading: Susan River vs Suttor — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Susan River, Queensland and Suttor, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Susan River has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Suttor (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Susan River or Suttor safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Susan River has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Suttor scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Susan River scores 20/100 for bushfire risk. Suttor scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Susan River or Suttor?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Susan River has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
